packageRules.description: Disable individual nix flake input updates — revs live in flake.lock not flake.nix; Renovate cannot do in-place updates. The nix manager errors on all inputs since 503b08e manually advanced flake.lock, which blocks lockFileMaintenance. Setting enabled:false here cleanly skips individual updates without disabling lockFileMaintenance (per Renovate docs).
Automerge container image digest updates after CI passes
Ignore postgres major version bumps — requires manual data migration
